title.en: Ye Tian and Yan Zu discussed and communicated.

content.en:
Ye Tian joined the Xuanyan Society, and he could communicate with the Xuanyan Society's Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and gain some experience from them in creating his own methods to break the boundaries of the other side's origin.

this day.

Ye Tian and Yan Zu discussed and communicated.

"Lord of Endless, are you going to take the path of breaking the boundaries of the Origin on the other side?" asked Yan Zu.

"I just want to find out!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

Yan Zu said with a smile: "If you take the path of awakening, the consumption of resources is too serious, not only do you need secret medicine formulas, but you also have to buy various secret medicines, and some of the sequelae of secret drugs are more serious, and your future will be cut off if you are not careful." It is much more difficult to take the path of breaking the boundary of the origin on the other side, but it does not require too many resources, you can rely on your own method to break through, if the talent is high enough, you will become a more powerful overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, but the probability is greater. I am also on the path of breaking the origin of the other side, but I have only broken the boundary of the origin of the other side three times so far!"

During the discussion and chat with Yan Zu, Ye Tian learned more and more about the second way.

Gradually, he had a little understanding.

After going back.

He began to study the second path on his own, allowing his replica body to be studied again and again as an experiment.

And I have to say that it is really difficult to create your own method to break the boundaries of the origin on the other side.

Even if Ye Tian can replicate the body again and again, it is not something that can be done in a short period of time.

Time passed, and in the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of primeval eras had passed.

That's when he realized that he was studying in the wrong direction.

The research route of each Origin Upper Realm Overlord is different, other people's may not be suitable for him, and he is cultivating the body of reincarnation Haotian, even if he takes the path of the origin of the other side, he will conflict with the origin of the other side.

However, he broke through with the body of reincarnation Haotian, and the origin of the other side also became the origin of reincarnation Haotian.

He actually had to let the reincarnation Haotian origin break the boundary, so he had to involve the method of reincarnation Haotian, and it also involved the reincarnation golden text.

Therefore, he had to use the reincarnation golden text to create his own method to break the boundaries of the origin of reincarnation Haotian.

As a result, he changed the direction of his research and began to use the golden text of reincarnation to create a similar method to help him break the boundaries of the origin of reincarnation Haotian.

After changing direction, he gradually realized that even if he could not create success in a short period of time, he at least saw hope.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Time flies.

After more than six million years of the primeval era.

this day.

Ye Tian finally succeeded in creating a method that helped break the first boundary of the origin of reincarnation Haotian.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian used this unknown method to break through.

Airplanes!!!!!

An incomparably huge reincarnation gold plate condensed around Ye Tian, and he sat in the center of the reincarnation gold plate, and the other side of the origin manifested and turned into a sea of origin on the other side, withstanding the compression of the reincarnation gold plate.

Rumble!!!!!

The Origin Ocean on the other side was slowly compressed, and the reincarnation of Haotian Origin was equivalent to being compressed, and the energy was frantically compressed, resulting in a qualitative transformation.

I don't know how long it has been, and the huge reincarnation Haotian Origin has been compressed into a ball that cannot be described in words.

At this moment, he had broken the boundary for the first time, and the origin of the other side had undergone a qualitative change.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's other side Origin Ancestor was also suppressed, and the strength of his whole body was almost condensed in the qualitatively changed Reincarnation Haotian Origin.

This kind of origin is very domineering, frantically absorbing any energy, in the future, he doesn't want to improve the other side of the origin ancestor in this situation.

After Ye Tian broke through, he began to study the reincarnation Haotian origin after breaking the boundary, which was already different from the previous reincarnation Haotian origin, and the essence of the transformation occurred.

He spent hundreds of thousands of years of primeval years researching, and gradually had enough understanding of the origin of reincarnation Haotian after the transformation.

But that's just the beginning of the research.

If he wants to embark on a new path, he has to combine the two paths and study them slowly.

So, he copied another replica body that took the path of awakening, combined with this replica body that walked the boundary of the origin on the other side, and the two replicated bodies jointly studied together, trying again and again to see if they could find a way for the two to coexist.

However, time and time again, the replicating body has been severely damaged.

However, he never gave up.

He didn't believe that there was no way to awaken the body of reincarnation Haotian, and at the same time, he also let the other side of the origin break the boundary.

It's just that he has to find a balance.

However, after millions of primeval years, he did not find that balance.

"The body of reincarnation Haotian and the origin of reincarnation Haotian are each regarded as two lines, these two lines move casually and cannot be stabilized, a line must be added to form a triangle, so that it can be stabilized!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He had only now thought of it, so if he was to find a balance, he would have to rely on a third force.

And what is the third force?

Ye Tian quickly thought of the power of the will of the Origin Realm!

The power of the will of the Origin Realm does not affect the first and second paths, but only the third path.

So.

He was still wrong before, he could not take the third path, but he had to rely on the will of the Origin Realm of the third path, that is, he had to break the limit of the will of the Origin Realm and add the will of the Origin Realm to it as a balanced third force.

Breaking the limit of the will of the Origin Realm is to sublimate the will of the Origin Realm, but it does not need to be integrated into the origin of the land on the other side of eternity.

And how to sublimate the will of the Origin Realm, there are also ways to do it on the other side of eternity.

One of the easiest ways to do this is to find some extremely rare resources, refine them, and forcibly sublimate the will of the Origin Realm.

The second way is to use some special secret medicine to sublimate the will of the Origin Realm.

These are two common approaches.

Ye Tian didn't know how to obtain that rare resource for the time being, but the secret medicine with great flaws could still be obtained, but that kind of secret medicine was very harmful to the will of the Origin Realm, and even if it was sublimated, it would be extremely difficult to improve it in the future.

But.

Ye Tian was just for research, so he naturally didn't care.

So, he only spent a small price to purchase this secret elixir formula, and then refined a Seed Origin Origin Realm Secret Elixir.

After that, he used this secret medicine to sublimate the will of the Origin Realm.
